item.description:
# MacCleaner 1.0.4
- Renumbered the product line to 1.0.1, 1.0.2, 1.0.3, and 1.0.4. - Redesigned Junk Files as a hierarchical category, folder, and file-path list with aggregate rows for many small files. - Added developer and AI owner groups, automatic selection of rebuildable data, protected-category visibility controls, and safer Trash policies. - Added a targeted administrator authorization retry for Large Files that fail due to macOS permissions. - Redesigned Tools, menu bar monitoring, diagnostics, Storage workflows, and documentation.
